summary: Iteration 127: Verified POS Order History with view/edit/delete capabilities. All 9 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed. Features tested: GET /cashier/orders, PUT /cashier/orders/{id}, DELETE /cashier/orders/{id}, order history dialog, order details view, edit order functionality, void order functionality.
seed_data_creation: Test orders created during testing were cleaned up by test fixtures
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 127: Verified POS Order History feature. Cashier PIN 1234 works. Orders button (data-testid='orders-history-btn') opens Today's Orders dialog. Order rows have data-testid='order-row-{order_number}'. Order details view has 'Edit Order' (data-testid='edit-order-btn') and 'Void Order' (data-testid='void-order-btn') buttons. Edit mode loads order into cart with 'Save Changes to Order #{n}' button (data-testid='save-edit-btn').

backend_get_orders.test_case: Returns list of today's POS orders
backend_get_orders.details: Returns array of order objects filtered by today's date

backend_create_verify_order.test_case: Create order then verify it appears in list
backend_create_verify_order.details: Order appears in list immediately after creation

backend_edit_order_notes_payment.details: Notes and payment_method updated and persisted correctly

backend_edit_order_items.test_case: Edit order items (add items, change quantity)
backend_edit_order_items.details: Items recalculated, total updated including tax

backend_delete_order.test_case: Void order and verify linked sale deleted
backend_delete_order.details: Order deleted, returns 404 on GET after delete

backend_delete_success_message.test_case: Returns success message with order number

frontend_order_history_dialog.test_case: Orders button opens Today's Orders dialog
frontend_order_history_dialog.details: Dialog shows list of orders with order number, items, total, status

frontend_order_details_view.test_case: Click order row to view details
frontend_order_details_view.details: Shows item breakdown, subtotal, tax, total, payment method, status

frontend_edit_order_button.test_case: Edit Order button visible and functional
frontend_edit_order_button.details: data-testid='edit-order-btn' loads order into cart for editing

frontend_edit_mode.test_case: Edit mode shows 'Editing Order #X' and 'Save Changes' button
frontend_edit_mode.details: Cart header changes, save button has data-testid='save-edit-btn'

frontend_void_order_button.test_case: Void Order button visible and functional
frontend_void_order_button.details: data-testid='void-order-btn' triggers confirm dialog, deletes order

frontend_void_confirmation.test_case: Order voided shows success toast and removes from list
frontend_void_confirmation.details: Toast shows 'Order voided', order count decreased after void

tests: Orders button visible in header - PASS
Create order and verify in history - PASS
Order details view with items/totals - PASS
Edit Order loads order into cart - PASS
Edit mode shows Save Changes button - PASS
Void Order removes order from list - PASS
